name: Alchemer
description: Enterprise survey and experience management platform with a REST API for managing surveys, accessing response data, managing contacts, and automating survey workflows.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Alchemer REST API
hasOfferCatalog.description: RESTful API v5 for managing surveys, responses, contacts, campaigns, and account resources within the Alchemer enterprise survey platform.

itemListElement.name: Alchemer REST API v5
itemListElement.description: Access surveys, responses, contacts, campaigns, and account resources via REST. Supports multi-region deployments (US, EU, Canada, Australia) with API key and OAuth 1.0 authentication.
